testcase.name: tests.test_docstrings
testcase.error: tests/test_docstrings.py:19: in <module> from monggregate import stages # pylint: disable=import-error ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/monggregate/__init__.py:3: in <module> from monggregate.dollar import S, SS .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/monggregate/dollar.py:17: in <module> from monggregate.operators import( .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/monggregate/operators/__init__.py:17: in <module> from monggregate.operators.array import( .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/monggregate/operators/array/__init__.py:6: in <module> from monggregate.operators.array.filter import Filter, filter # pylint: disable=redefined-builtin ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/monggregate/operators/array/filter.py:49: in <module> class Filter(ArrayOperator): .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/pydantic/v1/main.py:221: in __new__ inferred = ModelField.infer( .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/pydantic/v1/fields.py:504: in infer return cls( .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/pydantic/v1/fields.py:434: in __init__ self.prepare() .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/pydantic/v1/fields.py:555: in prepare self.populate_validators() .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/pydantic/v1/fields.py:829: in populate_validators *(get_validators() if get_validators else list(find_validators(self.type_, self.model_config))), ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/pydantic/v1/validators.py:768: in find_validators raise RuntimeError(f'no validator found for {type_}, see `arbitrary_types_allowed` in Config') E RuntimeError: no validator found for <class 'pydantic.v1.fields.UndefinedType'>, see `arbitrary_types_allowed` in Config

testcase.name: tests.test_dollar
